\label{\detokenize{Models:probabilistic-output-methods}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
All models accept a \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{dist\_method}} parameter controlling how deterministic
predictions are converted into tercile probabilities:


\begin{savenotes}\sphinxattablestart
\sphinxthistablewithglobalstyle
\centering
\begin{tabulary}{\linewidth}[t]{TT}
\sphinxtoprule
\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{dist\_method}}
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Description
\\
\sphinxmidrule
\sphinxtableatstartofbodyhook
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nonparam}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Non\sphinxhyphen{}parametric: rank historical cross\sphinxhyphen{}validation errors.
No distribution assumption. \sphinxstyleemphasis{Default and recommended.}
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{normal}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Gaussian distribution fitted to cross\sphinxhyphen{}validation errors.
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{gamma}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Gamma distribution — suitable for precipitation.
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{lognormal}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Log\sphinxhyphen{}normal distribution.
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{weibull\_min}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Weibull distribution.
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{bestfit}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Per\sphinxhyphen{}pixel best\sphinxhyphen{}fitting distribution from
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_TransformData.fit\_best\_distribution}}.
\\
\sphinxbottomrule
\end{tabulary}
\sphinxtableafterendhook\par
\sphinxattableend\end{savenotes}

\sphinxAtStartPar
To use \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{bestfit}}, pass the distribution parameter arrays returned by
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_TransformData}}:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{model}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}code\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}code}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}shape\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}shape}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}loc\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}loc}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}scale\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}scale}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Advanced Machine\sphinxhyphen{}Learning Models}
\label{\detokenize{Models:advanced-machine-learning-models}}\label{\detokenize{Models:ml-models}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
These models are non\sphinxhyphen{}linear regressors that share the same interface as the
linear models above. Hyperparameters are optimised per spatial cluster.


\subsubsection{Hyperparameter optimisation}
\label{\detokenize{Models:hyperparameter-optimisation}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
All ML classes support three search strategies via \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{optimization\_method}}:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"grid"}} — exhaustive grid search (reliable but slow).

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"random"}} — randomised search (faster for large spaces).

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"bayesian"}} — Optuna TPE sampler (recommended for MLP, stacking).

\end{itemize}


\subsubsection{Support Vector Regression — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_SVR}}}
\label{\detokenize{Models:support-vector-regression-was-svr}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}SVR}

\PYG{n}{svr} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}SVR}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{5}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{kernel}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{rbf}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{optimization\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{bayesian}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}trials}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{30}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{C\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{eps\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{deg\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clusters}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{kernel\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{gamma\PYGZus{}map} \PYG{o}{=} \PYGZbs{}
    \PYG{n}{svr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{svr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}next\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{epsilon}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{eps\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{C}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{C\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{kernel\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{kernel\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{degree\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{deg\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{gamma\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{gamma\PYGZus{}map}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Multi\sphinxhyphen{}Layer Perceptron — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_MLP}}}
\label{\detokenize{Models:multi-layer-perceptron-was-mlp}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}MLP}

\PYG{n}{mlp} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}MLP}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{optimization\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{random}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}trials}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{20}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hl}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{act}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{solver}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{lr}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{maxiter}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clusters} \PYG{o}{=} \PYGZbs{}
    \PYG{n}{mlp}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{mlp}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}next\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hl\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hl}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{act\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{act}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{lr\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{lr}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Stacking Ensemble — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_RandomForest\_XGBoost\_Stacking\_MLP}}}
\label{\detokenize{Models:stacking-ensemble-was-randomforest-xgboost-stacking-mlp}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
A two\sphinxhyphen{}layer ensemble: Random Forest and XGBoost as base learners, with an
MLP meta\sphinxhyphen{}learner trained on their out\sphinxhyphen{}of\sphinxhyphen{}fold predictions.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}RandomForest\PYGZus{}XGBoost\PYGZus{}Stacking\PYGZus{}MLP}

\PYG{n}{stacking} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}RandomForest\PYGZus{}XGBoost\PYGZus{}Stacking\PYGZus{}MLP}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{optimization\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{bayesian}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}trials}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{15}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}params}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clusters} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{stacking}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{stacking}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}train}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{X\PYGZus{}next\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}param\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}params}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{EOF Analysis and Principal Component Regression}
\label{\detokenize{Models:eof-analysis-and-principal-component-regression}}\label{\detokenize{Models:eof-pcr}}

\subsubsection{EOF analysis (WAS\_EOF)}
\label{\detokenize{Models:eof-analysis-was-eof}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_EOF}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Performs Empirical Orthogonal Function decomposition on a spatial field.
Cosine\sphinxhyphen{}latitude weighting corrects for area distortion; optional linear
detrending removes any long\sphinxhyphen{}term signal before analysis.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}EOF}

\PYG{n}{eof\PYGZus{}solver} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}EOF}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{opti\PYGZus{}explained\PYGZus{}variance}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{90}\PYG{p}{,}   \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Retain modes explaining ≥ 90 \PYGZpc{} variance}
    \PYG{n}{detrend}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{use\PYGZus{}coslat}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{eofs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{pcs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{exp\PYGZus{}var}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{\PYGZus{}} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{eof\PYGZus{}solver}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{fit}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}anomaly\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dim}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{eof\PYGZus{}solver}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}EOF}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{eofs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{exp\PYGZus{}var}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Principal Component Regression (WAS\_PCR)}
\label{\detokenize{Models:principal-component-regression-was-pcr}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_PCR}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
A wrapper that chains an EOF decomposition with any regression model. The
EOF is fitted on the training fold only, preventing leakage of test\sphinxhyphen{}year
information into the predictor space.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}PCR}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}ElasticNet\PYGZus{}Model}
\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n+nn}{numpy} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n+nn}{np}

\PYG{n}{regression\PYGZus{}model} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}ElasticNet\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{alpha\PYGZus{}range}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{np}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{logspace}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mf}{0.1}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{20}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio\PYGZus{}range}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mf}{0.5}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mf}{0.9999}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dist\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{nonparam}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{pcr} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}PCR}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{regression\PYGZus{}model}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{regression\PYGZus{}model}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}modes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{6}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{detrend}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{use\PYGZus{}coslat}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Hyperparameter search in PC space}
\PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clusters} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{regression\PYGZus{}model}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{pcs}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rename}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{mode}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transpose}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Cross\PYGZhy{}validate}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{pcr}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{pcs}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rename}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{mode}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transpose}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Operational forecast}
\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{pcr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}next\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{l1\PYGZus{}ratio}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Using SST indices instead of full EOF fields}

\sphinxAtStartPar
When working with pre\sphinxhyphen{}computed SST indices (e.g. NINO34, TNA, DMI), there is
no need for EOF reduction — pass the index dataset directly as the predictor:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}sst\PYGZus{}indices}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}LinearRegression\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{prepare\PYGZus{}predictand}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{statsmodels}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{stats}\PYG{n+nn}{.}\PYG{n+nn}{outliers\PYGZus{}influence} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{variance\PYGZus{}inflation\PYGZus{}factor} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n}{VIF}
\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n+nn}{pandas} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n+nn}{pd}

\PYG{n}{predictand} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{prepare\PYGZus{}predictand}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{variables\PYGZus{}obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{seas}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{seas\PYGZus{}obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{ds}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{False}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}index\PYGZus{}names} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{NINO34}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{TNA}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{TSA}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{DMI}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}
\PYG{n}{predictors} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}sst\PYGZus{}indices}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}reanalysis}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}index\PYGZus{}names}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ERA5.SST}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{seas}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{seas\PYGZus{}reanalysis}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Remove highly correlated indices (VIF \PYGZgt{} 5)}
\PYG{n}{vif\PYGZus{}data} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{pd}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{DataFrame}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{feature}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{to\PYGZus{}dataframe}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{columns}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{VIF}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{VIF}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{to\PYGZus{}dataframe}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{i}\PYG{p}{)}
            \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{i} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n+nb}{range}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{to\PYGZus{}dataframe}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{shape}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{]}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{low\PYGZus{}vif} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{vif\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{vif\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{VIF}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{o}{\PYGZlt{}} \PYG{l+m+mi}{5}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{feature}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{tolist}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{filtered} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{low\PYGZus{}vif}\PYG{p}{]}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{to\PYGZus{}array}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{rename}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{variable}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transpose}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{features}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{model} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}LinearRegression\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dist\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{nonparam}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}

    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
\PYG{p}{)}

\subsection{Canonical Correlation Analysis}
\label{\detokenize{Models:canonical-correlation-analysis}}\label{\detokenize{Models:cca-models}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_CCA}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
CCA finds pairs of spatial patterns — one in the predictor field and one in
the predictand field — that are maximally correlated. It is widely used for
GCM\sphinxhyphen{}output recalibration.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}CCA}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{retrieve\PYGZus{}single\PYGZus{}zone\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}PCR}

\PYG{n}{was\PYGZus{}cca} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}CCA}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}modes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}pca\PYGZus{}modes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{10}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dist\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{nonparam}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Retrieve predictor data (GCM output, spatially averaged over a zone)}
\PYG{n}{zone} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{A}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{A}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{150}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{150}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{45}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{45}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{n}{predictor} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{retrieve\PYGZus{}single\PYGZus{}zone\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}PCR}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}model}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{zone}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ECMWF\PYGZus{}51.PRCP}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{model}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{month\PYGZus{}of\PYGZus{}initialization}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{lead\PYGZus{}time}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}
\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{isel}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{T}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{slice}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{k+kc}{None}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{predictor}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Visualise CCA modes}
\PYG{n}{was\PYGZus{}cca}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}cca\PYGZus{}results}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{X}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{predictor}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{Y}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Cross\PYGZhy{}validate}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{was\PYGZus{}cca}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictor}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Operational forecast}
\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{was\PYGZus{}cca}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{predictor}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictor}   \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} last arg = real\PYGZhy{}time predictor}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Analog Forecasting}
\label{\detokenize{Models:analog-forecasting}}\label{\detokenize{Models:analog-methods}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Analog}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Identifies historically similar years (analogs) by comparing SST or climate
index patterns and composites their observed rainfall to produce a forecast.


\subsubsection{Analog selection methods}
\label{\detokenize{Models:analog-selection-methods}}\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"som"}} — Self\sphinxhyphen{}Organising Maps (minisom).

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"cor\_based"}} — Pearson correlation distance in index space.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"pca\_based"}} — PCA followed by Euclidean distance.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"kmeans\_based"}} — K\sphinxhyphen{}Means clustering.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{"agglomerative\_based"}} — Agglomerative (Ward) clustering.

\end{itemize}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Analog}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}

\PYG{n}{analog} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Analog}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./data/analog/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}forecast}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2025}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{reanalysis\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{NOAA.SST}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{model\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ECMWF\PYGZus{}51.SST}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{method\PYGZus{}analog}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{som}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{month\PYGZus{}of\PYGZus{}initialization}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{define\PYGZus{}extent}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{180}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{180}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{45}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{45}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{index\PYGZus{}compute}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{NINO34}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{DMI}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dist\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{nonparam}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Download and preprocess SST data}
\PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}hist}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{sst\PYGZus{}for} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{analog}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{download\PYGZus{}and\PYGZus{}process}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Cross\PYGZhy{}validate}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{rainfall}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{analog}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{rainfall}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Forecast}
\PYG{n}{\PYGZus{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{similar\PYGZus{}years}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{analog}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{rainfall}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Composite plot (observed SST pattern + rainfall composite)}
\PYG{n}{analog}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{composite\PYGZus{}plot}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{rainfall}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}predictor}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Cross\sphinxhyphen{}Validation}
\label{\detokenize{Models:cross-validation}}\label{\detokenize{Models:id1}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
wass2s uses a leave\sphinxhyphen{}one\sphinxhyphen{}out scheme with a symmetric exclusion window to prevent
temporal data leakage from near\sphinxhyphen{}neighbour years.

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\capstart

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics[scale=0.7]{{cvv}.png}
\caption{Cross\sphinxhyphen{}validation scheme: pink = training, yellow = omitted buffer,
white = predicted year.}\label{\detokenize{Models:id2}}\end{figure}

\sphinxAtStartPar
For each test year \sphinxstyleemphasis{i}, a window of \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{nb\_omit + 1}} years centred on \sphinxstyleemphasis{i} is
excluded from the training set. This prevents the model from seeing years that
are strongly autocorrelated with the year being predicted.

\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Cross\_Validator}} class automatically selects the correct
preprocessing path for each model family — standardisation, detrending,
EOF fitting, and tercile classification are all applied inside the fold loop,
never on the full time series.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}

\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}      \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Exclude the 2 years on each side of the test year}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{model}\PYG{p}{,}          \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Any WAS model instance}
    \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{predictor}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{model\PYGZus{}params}  \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Hyperparameters forwarded to compute\PYGZus{}model}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Estimating forecast uncertainty}
\label{\detokenize{Models:estimating-forecast-uncertainty}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Deterministic model outputs (the best\sphinxhyphen{}guess seasonal total) are converted
to tercile probabilities by comparing a fitted probability density function
centred on the forecast to the climatological distribution.

\begin{figure}[htbp]
\centering
\capstart

\noindent\sphinxincludegraphics[scale=0.7]{{generation_proba}.png}
\caption{Tercile probability estimation: the forecast PDF (blue) is integrated over
the below\sphinxhyphen{}normal (<T1), near\sphinxhyphen{}normal (T1–T2), and above\sphinxhyphen{}normal (>T2) regions
of the observed climatological distribution.}\label{\detokenize{Models:id3}}\end{figure}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Classification\sphinxhyphen{}based models (logistic regression, extended logistic
regression, SVM classifiers) estimate tercile probabilities directly without
building a continuous PDF.

\begin{sphinxadmonition}{important}{Important:}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Always pass \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{predictor.isel(T=slice(None, \sphinxhyphen{}1))}} to \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{cross\_validate}}
so that the real\sphinxhyphen{}time (last) predictor step is excluded from the
validation period. Then pass \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{predictor.isel(T={[}\sphinxhyphen{}1{]})}} as
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{Predictor\_for\_year}} in the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{forecast}} call.
\end{sphinxadmonition}

\sphinxstepscope


\section{Verification}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:verification}}\label{\detokenize{Verification::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Verification}} class provides deterministic, probabilistic, and
ensemble verification metrics for gridded seasonal forecasts. All scores are
computed pixel\sphinxhyphen{}wise on \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{xarray.DataArrays}} and can be visualised directly
on Cartopy maps.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Verification}

\PYG{n}{verifier} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Verification}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Metadata for all available scores (name, range, colormap, type) can be
retrieved as a dictionary:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{metadata} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}scores\PYGZus{}metadata}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Deterministic Metrics}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:deterministic-metrics}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
These metrics compare point predictions to observations and are computed via
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{compute\_deterministic\_score}}, which applies the chosen function spatially:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{score\PYGZus{}map} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}deterministic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{score\PYGZus{}func}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{model\PYGZus{}data}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Available deterministic metrics:

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Example}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{pearson} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}deterministic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{pearson\PYGZus{}corr}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{kge} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}deterministic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{kling\PYGZus{}gupta\PYGZus{}efficiency}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}model\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{pearson}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Pearson}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./scores/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{figure\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Pearson\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
To compare multiple models in a grid layout:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}models\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Ridge}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pearson\PYGZus{}ridge}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{MARS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{pearson\PYGZus{}mars}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Pearson}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./scores/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Probabilistic Metrics}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:probabilistic-metrics}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Probabilistic metrics evaluate tercile\sphinxhyphen{}probability forecasts (PB, PN, PA)
and are computed via \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{compute\_probabilistic\_score}}.

\sphinxAtStartPar
Available probabilistic metrics:

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Example}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{groc} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}probabilistic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{calculate\PYGZus{}groc}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{rpss} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}probabilistic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{calculate\PYGZus{}rpss}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}model\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{groc}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{GROC}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./scores/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Reliability diagrams and ROC curves}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:reliability-diagrams-and-roc-curves}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Reliability diagram for each tercile category}
\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{reliability\PYGZus{}diagram}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{modelname}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Ridge}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./scores/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}true}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}probs}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} ROC curves with 95 \PYGZpc{} bootstrap confidence intervals}
\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}roc\PYGZus{}curves}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{modelname}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Ridge}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./scores/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}true}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{y\PYGZus{}probs}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}bootstraps}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1000}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{ci}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{0.95}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Ensemble Metrics}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:ensemble-metrics}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) evaluates forecasts that
provide a full ensemble distribution (e.g. raw GCM ensembles).

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{crps\PYGZus{}map} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}crps}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{ensemble\PYGZus{}hindcast}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{member\PYGZus{}dim}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{number}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{dim}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Year\sphinxhyphen{}by\sphinxhyphen{}Year Validation}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:year-by-year-validation}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Two utilities support annual verification:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Classify a specific year relative to climatology}
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} (Well Above Average, Above Average, Near Average, …)}
\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{ratio\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}average}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2023}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Compute RPSS for one year and plot the result on a map}
\PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}one\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}rpss}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{prob\PYGZus{}pred}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2023}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{Tercile Classification Utilities}
\label{\detokenize{Verification:tercile-classification-utilities}}
\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Assign each observed year to a tercile class (0=BN, 1=NN, 2=AN)}
\PYG{n}{classes} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}class}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1991}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Classify with pre\PYGZhy{}computed thresholds}
\PYG{n}{classified} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{classify\PYGZus{}data\PYGZus{}into\PYGZus{}terciles}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{y}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{T1}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{t1\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{T2}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{t2\PYGZus{}map}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxstepscope


\section{Multi\sphinxhyphen{}Model Ensemble Methods}
\label{\detokenize{mme:multi-model-ensemble-methods}}\label{\detokenize{mme::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{was\_mme}} module combines hindcasts and forecasts from multiple GCMs
to improve seasonal predictive skill. It provides methods ranging from simple
weighted averaging to advanced machine\sphinxhyphen{}learning stacking and statistical
calibration, all producing tercile\sphinxhyphen{}probability outputs.

\begin{sphinxadmonition}{note}{Note:}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Some classes in this module are still under active development. Check the
{\hyperref[\detokenize{api::doc}]{\sphinxcrossref{\DUrole{doc}{API reference}}}} for the latest status.
\end{sphinxadmonition}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{1. Data Preparation}
\label{\detokenize{mme:data-preparation}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Function}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{process\_datasets\_for\_mme}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Loads, regrids, and harmonises hindcasts and real\sphinxhyphen{}time forecasts from
multiple models onto the common observational grid. This is always the
first step before any MME method.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{process\PYGZus{}datasets\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}mme}

\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{scores} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{process\PYGZus{}datasets\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}mme}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{rainfall}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save\PYGZus{}model}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./data/GCM/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ECMWF\PYGZus{}51}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{NCEP\PYGZus{}2}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{UKMO\PYGZus{}604}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{score\PYGZus{}metric}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{GROC}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The returned \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{hdcst}} DataArray has dimensions \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{(T, M, Y, X)}} where
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{M}} is the model dimension.


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{2. Weighted Ensemble Averaging}
\label{\detokenize{mme:weighted-ensemble-averaging}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_Weighted}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Combines model hindcasts using weights derived from a historical skill score.
Models whose score falls below a threshold receive zero weight.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Weighted}

\PYG{n}{mme} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Weighted}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{equal\PYGZus{}weighted}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{False}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{metric}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{GROC}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{threshold}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{0.5}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hcst\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}det} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{mme}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{scores}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Tercile probabilities from the ensemble mean}
\PYG{n}{hcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{mme}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hcst\PYGZus{}det}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_ProbWeighted}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Computes weights at the probability level (per tercile category) rather than
on the deterministic mean.


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{3. Min et al. (2009) Probabilistic MME}
\label{\detokenize{mme:min-et-al-2009-probabilistic-mme}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Class}: \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Min2009\_ProbWeighted}}

\sphinxAtStartPar
Implements the PMME method from Min et al. (2009):
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Computes per\sphinxhyphen{}model tercile probabilities assuming a Gaussian or log\sphinxhyphen{}normal
distribution.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Weights models proportionally to the square root of their ensemble size.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Combines the weighted probabilities.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Produces a chi\sphinxhyphen{}square combined map to flag areas of significant ensemble
signal.

\end{enumerate}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Min2009\PYGZus{}ProbWeighted}

\PYG{n}{pmme} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Min2009\PYGZus{}ProbWeighted}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{ensemble\PYGZus{}sizes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ECMWF\PYGZus{}51}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+m+mi}{25}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{NCEP\PYGZus{}2}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{l+m+mi}{24}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{pmme}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}combined\PYGZus{}map}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{hindcasts}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{new\PYGZus{}forecasts}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{4. Machine\sphinxhyphen{}Learning Ensemble Methods}
\label{\detokenize{mme:machine-learning-ensemble-methods}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
These methods treat the MME problem as a regression task: given GCM outputs
as predictors, learn to reproduce observed rainfall. Hyperparameters are
optimised per spatial cluster.


\subsubsection{Stacking super\sphinxhyphen{}ensemble — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_Stacking}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:stacking-super-ensemble-was-mme-stacking}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
A two\sphinxhyphen{}layer architecture:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Layer 0 (base)}: Random Forest, XGBoost, HP\sphinxhyphen{}ELM, MLP — each generates
out\sphinxhyphen{}of\sphinxhyphen{}fold predictions.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Layer 1 (meta)}: Ridge, Lasso, or ElasticNet trained on the OOF outputs.

\end{itemize}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Stacking}

\PYG{n}{stacking} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Stacking}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{meta\PYGZus{}learner\PYGZus{}type}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ridge}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{meta\PYGZus{}search\PYGZus{}method}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{bayesian}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{stacking}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det\PYGZus{}cross}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst\PYGZus{}cv}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Individual machine\sphinxhyphen{}learning regressors}
\label{\detokenize{mme:individual-machine-learning-regressors}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Each of these classes shares the same \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{forecast}} signature as
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_Stacking}}:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Random Forest} — \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_RF}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{XGBoost} — \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_XGBoosting}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Multi\sphinxhyphen{}Layer Perceptron} — \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_MLP}}

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Extreme Learning Machine} — \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_hpELM}}

\end{itemize}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}RF}

\PYG{n}{rf\PYGZus{}mme} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}RF}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{5}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{rf\PYGZus{}mme}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det\PYGZus{}cross}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst\PYGZus{}cv}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\bigskip\hrule\bigskip



\subsection{5. Calibration and Post\sphinxhyphen{}Processing}
\label{\detokenize{mme:calibration-and-post-processing}}

\subsubsection{Non\sphinxhyphen{}Homogeneous Gaussian Regression — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_NGR\_Gaussian}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:non-homogeneous-gaussian-regression-was-mme-ngr-gaussian}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Calibrates the ensemble mean and spread by minimising the Continuous Ranked
Probability Score (CRPS). The calibrated forecast distribution is:
\begin{equation*}
\begin{split}\mu = a + b \, \bar{x}_{\mathrm{ens}}, \qquad
\sigma = \sqrt{c^2 + d^2 \, s^2_{\mathrm{ens}}}\end{split}
\end{equation*}
\sphinxAtStartPar
where \(a, b, c, d\) are fitted coefficients, \(\bar{x}_{\mathrm{ens}}\)
is the ensemble mean, and \(s^2_{\mathrm{ens}}\) is the ensemble variance.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}NGR\PYGZus{}Gaussian}

\PYG{n}{ngr} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}NGR\PYGZus{}Gaussian}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{ngr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{Predictor\PYGZus{}for\PYGZus{}year}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Bayesian Model Averaging — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_FastBMA}}, \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_FullBMA}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:bayesian-model-averaging-was-mme-fastbma-was-mme-fullbma}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
BMA assigns posterior weights to each model’s predictive distribution:
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_FastBMA}} — EM algorithm; fast convergence for small ensembles.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_FullBMA}} — grid search over kernel bandwidths; more accurate.

\end{itemize}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}FastBMA}

\PYG{n}{bma} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}FastBMA}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{bma}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{forecast}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{Predictant}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Extended Logistic Regression — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_xcELR}}, \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_ELR}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:extended-logistic-regression-was-mme-xcelr-was-mme-elr}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Estimates tercile probabilities directly by fitting a logistic regression
on the ensemble mean as a continuous predictor of each category boundary.
\begin{itemize}
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_xcELR}} — wraps the xcast ELR implementation (splits on \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{S}}
dimension).

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_ELR}} — native wass2s implementation.

\end{itemize}

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}ELR}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}

\PYG{n}{elr} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}ELR}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{elr}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Logistic MME — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_logistic}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:logistic-mme-was-mme-logistic}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Multinomial logistic regression trained on all GCM outputs simultaneously.
Produces direct probability estimates for each tercile category.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}logistic}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}

\PYG{n}{logistic\PYGZus{}mme} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}logistic}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{cv} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{logistic\PYGZus{}mme}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2016}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsubsection{Mean and Variance Adjustment — \sphinxstyleliteralintitle{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_MVA}}}
\label{\detokenize{mme:mean-and-variance-adjustment-was-mme-mva}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
A simple bias\sphinxhyphen{}correction technique that rescales the forecast mean and
variance to match the observational climatology.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}MVA}

\PYG{n}{mva} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}MVA}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{mva}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{fit}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{hindcast\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{hdcst}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{obs\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{obs}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{calibrated} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{mva}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{transform}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}da}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{fcst}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxstepscope


\section{Implementing WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen Approaches}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:implementing-was-nextgen-approaches}}\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen (West Africa Seasonal Forecasting Next Generation) framework
defines the methodological standards for operational seasonal forecasting
across the region, aligned with WMO guidelines for objective, reproducible,
and scientifically rigorous seasonal outlooks.

\sphinxAtStartPar
wass2s was designed from the ground up to implement this framework end\sphinxhyphen{}to\sphinxhyphen{}end.
This page describes the recommended workflow for producing a WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen
compliant seasonal forecast.


\subsection{Overview of the WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen pipeline}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:overview-of-the-was-nextgen-pipeline}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
A WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen seasonal forecast consists of five main stages:
\begin{enumerate}
\sphinxsetlistlabels{\arabic}{enumi}{enumii}{}{.}%
\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Data preparation} — download and harmonise GCM hindcasts, reanalysis,
and observational products.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Predictor construction} — compute SST indices or spatial EOF predictors.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Model calibration and cross\sphinxhyphen{}validation} — fit and validate one or more
statistical or ML models using leave\sphinxhyphen{}one\sphinxhyphen{}out cross\sphinxhyphen{}validation.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Multi\sphinxhyphen{}model combination} — combine calibrated models into an ensemble.

\item {} 
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxstylestrong{Verification and dissemination} — score the hindcast and produce
tercile\sphinxhyphen{}probability maps for end users.

\end{enumerate}


\subsection{Recommended model hierarchy}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:recommended-model-hierarchy}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
The WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen guidelines recommend applying models in order of complexity,
using verification scores to select the best performers:


\begin{savenotes}\sphinxattablestart
\sphinxthistablewithglobalstyle
\centering
\begin{tabular}[t]{\X{30}{100}\X{40}{100}\X{30}{100}}
\sphinxtoprule
\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Category
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Recommended classes
&\sphinxstyletheadfamily 
\sphinxAtStartPar
Typical use case
\\
\sphinxmidrule
\sphinxtableatstartofbodyhook
\sphinxAtStartPar
Baseline
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_LinearRegression\_Model}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
SST indices as predictors
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
Regularised linear
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Ridge\_Model}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_ElasticNet\_Model}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Correlated SST indices or PC predictors
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
Spatial dimensionality reduction
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_PCR}} + any regression back\sphinxhyphen{}end
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Full SST or SLP fields
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
Non\sphinxhyphen{}linear
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_SVR}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_MLP}}, stacking ensembles
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
When residuals show non\sphinxhyphen{}linear structure
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
GCM recalibration
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_CCA}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_NGR\_Gaussian}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_ELR}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
GCM output as predictor
\\
\sphinxhline
\sphinxAtStartPar
MME combination
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_Weighted}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_FastBMA}}, \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_mme\_Stacking}}
&
\sphinxAtStartPar
Multi\sphinxhyphen{}model ensembles
\\
\sphinxbottomrule
\end{tabular}
\sphinxtableafterendhook\par
\sphinxattableend\end{savenotes}


\subsection{Running multiple models and selecting the best}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:running-multiple-models-and-selecting-the-best}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
A typical WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen workflow runs several candidate models, verifies each
with GROC and RPSS, selects the top performers, and combines them.

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{o}{*}
\PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n+nn}{numpy} \PYG{k}{as} \PYG{n+nn}{np}

\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{l+m+mi}{1993}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+m+mi}{2020}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} \PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{} Predictors and predictand (already downloaded) \PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}}
\PYG{n}{predictand}  \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{prepare\PYGZus{}predictand}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{predictors}  \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}sst\PYGZus{}indices}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{p}{)}  \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} SST indices}
\PYG{n}{predictor\PYGZus{}field} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{load\PYGZus{}gridded\PYGZus{}predictor}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{p}{)}  \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Full SST field}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} \PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{} Candidate models \PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}\PYGZhy{}}
\PYG{n}{models} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{OLS}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}    \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}LinearRegression\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Ridge}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}  \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Ridge\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}clusters}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{6}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{ElNet}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}  \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}ElasticNet\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{PCR}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:}    \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}PCR}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Ridge\PYGZus{}Model}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}modes}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{8}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{detrend}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{True}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}

\PYG{n}{verifier} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Verification}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{cv}       \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}Cross\PYGZus{}Validator}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{n\PYGZus{}splits}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{len}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}index}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{T}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}omit}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{2}
\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{hindcasts\PYGZus{}det}  \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{n}{hindcasts\PYGZus{}prob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
\PYG{n}{groc\PYGZus{}scores}    \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}

\PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{name}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{model} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{models}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{items}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
    \PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Hyperparameter tuning if available}
    \PYG{k}{if} \PYG{n+nb}{hasattr}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{model}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{\PYGZus{}} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{model}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}hyperparameters}\PYG{p}{(}
            \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
        \PYG{p}{)}
        \PYG{n}{params} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{alpha}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{:} \PYG{n}{alpha}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}
    \PYG{k}{else}\PYG{p}{:}
        \PYG{n}{params} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{p}{\PYGZob{}}\PYG{p}{\PYGZcb{}}

    \PYG{n}{hdet}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hprob} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cv}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{cross\PYGZus{}validate}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{model}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{predictors}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{isel}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{T}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n+nb}{slice}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{k+kc}{None}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}}\PYG{l+m+mi}{1}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{o}{*}\PYG{o}{*}\PYG{n}{params}
    \PYG{p}{)}
    \PYG{n}{hindcasts\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{p}{]}  \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{hdet}
    \PYG{n}{hindcasts\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{hprob}

    \PYG{n}{groc\PYGZus{}scores}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{name}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute\PYGZus{}probabilistic\PYGZus{}score}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{n}{verifier}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{calculate\PYGZus{}groc}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hprob}\PYG{p}{,}
        \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}start}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{clim\PYGZus{}year\PYGZus{}end}
    \PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Select best models (top GROC over the domain average)}
\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{get\PYGZus{}best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{center\PYGZus{}variable}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{PRCP}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{scores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{groc\PYGZus{}scores}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{metric}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{GROC}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{top\PYGZus{}n}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{3}
\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n+nb}{print}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Best models:}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Multi\sphinxhyphen{}model ensemble of the best performers}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:multi-model-ensemble-of-the-best-performers}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Once the best individual models are identified, combine them with a
skill\sphinxhyphen{}weighted ensemble:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Weighted}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Stack selected hindcasts along the model dimension}
\PYG{n}{hdcst\PYGZus{}stack} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{xr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{concat}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{hindcasts\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{m}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{m} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dim}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{M}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{assign\PYGZus{}coords}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{M}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Skill scores for weighting}
\PYG{n}{scores\PYGZus{}stack} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{xr}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{concat}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{groc\PYGZus{}scores}\PYG{p}{[}\PYG{n}{m}\PYG{p}{]} \PYG{k}{for} \PYG{n}{m} \PYG{o+ow}{in} \PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{]}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{dim}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{M}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{assign\PYGZus{}coords}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{M}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{best\PYGZus{}models}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{n}{mme} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}mme\PYGZus{}Weighted}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{equal\PYGZus{}weighted}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{k+kc}{False}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{metric}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{GROC}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{threshold}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mf}{0.5}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{mme\PYGZus{}det}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{mme\PYGZus{}prob\PYGZus{}fcst} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{mme}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{predictand}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{hdcst\PYGZus{}stack}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{fcst\PYGZus{}stack}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{scores\PYGZus{}stack}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}


\subsection{Operational forecast dissemination}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:operational-forecast-dissemination}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Once the ensemble forecast is ready, generate the tercile\sphinxhyphen{}probability map:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{n}{plot\PYGZus{}prob\PYGZus{}forecasts}\PYG{p}{(}
    \PYG{n}{dir\PYGZus{}to\PYGZus{}save}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{./forecasts/}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{forecast\PYGZus{}prob}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{mme\PYGZus{}prob\PYGZus{}fcst}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{model\PYGZus{}name}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{WAS\PYGZhy{}NextGen MME}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{p}{,}
    \PYG{n}{title}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{p}{(}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{JJAS 2025 Rainfall Forecast — West Africa}\PYG{l+s+se}{\PYGZbs{}n}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
        \PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}\PYG{l+s+s2}{Issued April 2025}\PYG{l+s+s2}{\PYGZdq{}}
    \PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{p}{)}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
The output map shows three panels (PB, PN, PA) with the dominant category
highlighted and probability values encoded in the colour scale, following
the standard WAS\sphinxhyphen{}NextGen cartographic conventions.


\subsection{Agroclimatic forecast products}
\label{\detokenize{ImplementWASNextGen:agroclimatic-forecast-products}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
In addition to seasonal rainfall totals, wass2s can produce forecasts for
agroclimatic indices that are directly useful to national agricultural
extension services:

\begin{sphinxVerbatim}[commandchars=\\\{\}]
\PYG{k+kn}{from} \PYG{n+nn}{wass2s} \PYG{k+kn}{import} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}compute\PYGZus{}onset}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}compute\PYGZus{}cessation}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Compute onset and cessation dates from downscaled daily data}
\PYG{n}{onset\PYGZus{}da}     \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}compute\PYGZus{}onset}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{daily\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{daily\PYGZus{}rain}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}
\PYG{n}{cessation\PYGZus{}da} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{WAS\PYGZus{}compute\PYGZus{}cessation}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{p}{)}\PYG{o}{.}\PYG{n}{compute}\PYG{p}{(}\PYG{n}{daily\PYGZus{}data}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{n}{daily\PYGZus{}rain}\PYG{p}{,} \PYG{n}{nb\PYGZus{}cores}\PYG{o}{=}\PYG{l+m+mi}{4}\PYG{p}{)}

\PYG{c+c1}{\PYGZsh{} Season length (days)}
\PYG{n}{season\PYGZus{}length} \PYG{o}{=} \PYG{n}{cessation\PYGZus{}da} \PYG{o}{\PYGZhy{}} \PYG{n}{onset\PYGZus{}da}
\end{sphinxVerbatim}

\sphinxAtStartPar
These outputs can then be used as predictands in the same modelling framework,
replacing seasonal totals with any agroclimatic index computed by
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{was\_compute\_predictand}}.

\sphinxstepscope


\section{API Reference}
\label{\detokenize{api:api-reference}}\label{\detokenize{api::doc}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
This page is auto\sphinxhyphen{}generated from the source\sphinxhyphen{}code docstrings. Each section
corresponds to one module in the \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{wass2s}} package.

\begin{sphinxadmonition}{note}{Note:}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Duplicate\sphinxhyphen{}object warnings (methods appearing in both \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{automodule}} and
individual \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{autoclass}} blocks) are suppressed via \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{suppress\_warnings}}
in \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{conf.py}}. If you add new modules, add them here \sphinxstylestrong{and} in
\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{conf.py}}.
\end{sphinxadmonition}


\subsection{Data download}
\label{\detokenize{api:module-wass2s.was_download}}\label{\detokenize{api:data-download}}\index{module@\spxentry{module}!wass2s.was\_download@\spxentry{wass2s.was\_download}}\index{wass2s.was\_download@\spxentry{wass2s.was\_download}!module@\spxentry{module}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Data download utilities for ERA5, CHIRPS, TAMSAT, and NMME.

\sphinxAtStartPar
Provides a unified interface for downloading and pre\sphinxhyphen{}processing gridded
seasonal hindcast and reanalysis datasets.


\subsubsection{Class}
\label{\detokenize{api:class}}\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{WAS\_Download}
\sphinxAtStartPar
Central download manager.  Key methods:
\begin{description}
\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_Models}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
NMME and C3S seasonal forecast / hindcast data.

\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_Reanalysis}} / \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_Reanalysis\_}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
ERA5 single\sphinxhyphen{}level and pressure\sphinxhyphen{}level reanalysis (via CDS).

\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_ERA5Land}} / \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_ERA5Land\_daily}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
ERA5\sphinxhyphen{}Land daily and monthly data.

\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_CHIRPSv3\_Seasonal}} / \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_CHIRPSv3\_Daily}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
CHIRPS v3 precipitation (seasonal aggregates and daily fields).

\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_TAMSAT\_Seasonal}} / \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_TAMSAT\_Daily}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
TAMSAT African rainfall estimates.

\sphinxlineitem{\sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_AgroIndicators}} / \sphinxcode{\sphinxupquote{WAS\_Download\_AgroIndicators\_daily}}}
\sphinxAtStartPar
NMME\sphinxhyphen{}derived agroclimatic indicator downloads.

\end{description}

\end{description}
